SPECTRUM

One gaze, many domains

From mobility to wearables, my priority stays constant.
Quality in build, emotion in scene.

MINHO SONG

I study mobility design and digital visualization, exploring diverse tools and creative processes.

To me, design is about creating a meaningful flow, an experience that brings joy and ease to people’s lives.

I aim to grow as a designer who can sense that flow, shape it with intent, and contribute meaningfully to the teams I work with.
